root_cause: replicaTimeout=240s but audit container runs as long-lived sampler daemon; platform sends SIGTERM at 240s, container exit code != 0, ACA marks execution as Failed

evidence.observation: All 4 subject-app revisions captured with replica state; data is COMPLETE despite all 15 prior executions marked Failed in Portal executionHistory blade

operational_impact: NONE — data ingestion is unaffected. Operators must NOT alert on audit-sampler executionHistory failure count. The Failed status is a Portal-level artifact of the timeout-eviction lifecycle.
remediation_options: Accept Failed status (current design; documented in lab guide)
Add explicit trap on SIGTERM in container script to exit 0 (would mask other real failures)
Change job semantics from cron-daemon to one-shot snapshot (would lose continuous sampling cadence)
